content: {"body":"I am excited to apply for the Data Engineer role at Atlassian. In my recent work I have led end‑to‑end delivery for squads, owning sprint cadence, PI Planning, capacity management, and executive status reporting. I have architected test‑automation strategies that cut evidence effort from ~3 hours to ~15 minutes per scenario, and I have delivered analytics applications using Next.js + Supabase that expose sprint velocity metrics and generate LLM‑powered retrospective insights and sprint plans.\n\nMy experience spans AI/ML strategy, MLOps, and CI/CD, where I have built LLM evaluation stacks with Langfuse + Phoenix to score hallucination, latency, and cost across high‑volume daily LLM generations, reducing error‑budget breaches by 38%. I have also deployed real‑time telemetry servers that improved user response time by reducing P95 latency to under 200 ms, and I have managed multi‑million‑dollar budgets while ensuring 100% regulatory compliance for data initiatives. I am confident that my blend of technical leadership, data‑driven analytics, and agile delivery will help Atlassian continue to innovate and scale its analytics funnel."}
